breakdown: This PR consolidates XP extraction by removing the _extract_xp_from_player_data helper function and replacing its usages with extract_character_xp across the codebase. It also adds XP synthesis paths to _synthesize_generic_rewards_box to handle xp_awarded from combat/encounter summaries. The changes are focused and consistent with the existing codebase patterns. Test coverage exists for the removed function. Documentation is adequate but some newly added code paths lack detailed docstrings explaining edge cases.
key_changes: Removed _extract_xp_from_player_data function (~40 lines) and replaced all calls with extract_character_xp
Modified _synthesize_generic_rewards_box combat path to check xp_awarded from combat_summary before falling back to rewards_pending
_synthesize_generic_rewards_box now supports xp_awarded in encounter_summary with same fallback logic
check_and_set_level_up_pending_impl renamed to ensure_level_up_rewards_pending for clarity
